---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or direction for ApiaryLens
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the beekeeping/hive-management problem this addresses, not just the
feature itself.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If this affects tech stack, data model, or architecture,
consider whether it needs an ADR under `docs/` instead of/in addition to this
issue.

## Alignment with project principles

Briefly note how this fits (or tensions with) ApiaryLens's principles: open source
first, self-hosted first, offline-first, privacy-first, AI-assisted-not-required,
scales from one hive to a commercial apiary. See README.md.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you didn't propose them instead.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, related issues, prior art in other hive-management tools.
